name: citybike
description: This repository contains minimal scaffolding for the five required services. No architecture, authentication, or API design is provided.

scripts.dev: concurrently "cd services/user-service && cross-env PORT=3001 npm start" "cd services/ride-service && cross-env PORT=3002 npm start" "cd services/bike-inventory-service && cross-env PORT=3003 npm start" "cd services/payment-service && cross-env PORT=3004 npm start" "cd services/partner-analytics-service && cross-env PORT=3005 npm start"
